name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle check-in before the chairs fill up. Yesterday brought a few new faces to the practice and a handful of bookings on the calendar — nothing that needs chasing, just wanted you in the loop.

The team's set up for a smooth day. If anything shifts, you'll hear from us first.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
